id: # Edit stats/text/keywords freely; add new rows under the right section. `effect` is a plain-English
# note of what the card does (Claude wires the real EffectDef). `golden_text` / `golden_effect` show
# the TRIPLED version — for triaging triple issues. `art` = is illustrated art wired (PNG present).
# (Venomous = one-touch kill; drops off after its first proc in combat
name: unless re-granted)

id: # (Shield = Divine Shield; Start = Start of Combat; Rally = fires just before this minion attacks)
# Note: golden stats are always 2x base. The auto-doubler doubles "+N"
name: "deal N"

id: # Word-counts ("a"/"two"/"twice") do NOT auto-update — those cards carry an explicit golden_text override (shown here).

name: Brightwing Broker
text: Every minion you buy gets +1/+1.
golden_text: Every minion you buy gets +2/+2.

name: Echo Warden
text: In combat, your summon effects summon 1 more copy.
golden_text: In combat, your summon effects summon 2 more copies.
golden_effect: +2 copies; STACKS additively with other Echoes

name: Buddy Buddy
text: Battlecry: add a random Tier 1 minion to your hand.
golden_text: Battlecry: add two random Tier 1 minions to your hand.

name: Archmagus Guel
text: After you cast a tavern spell, give 2 other friendly minions +1/+1.
golden_text: After you cast a tavern spell, give 2 other friendly minions +2/+2.

name: Flowing Monk
text: When you summon a minion that doesn't fit, give a random friend +3/+3.
golden_text: When you summon a minion that doesn't fit, give a random friend +6/+6.

name: Drakko the Drummer
text: Your Battlecries fire 1 more time.
golden_text: Your Battlecries fire 2 more times.
golden_effect: Battlecries fire 3x; does NOT stack with other Drakkos

name: Sylus the Reaper
text: In combat, your Deathrattles proc 1 more time.
golden_text: In combat, your Deathrattles proc 2 more times.
golden_effect: Deathrattles +2 procs; DOES stack with other Sylus

name: Chronos
text: Your End of Turn effects trigger 1 more time.
effect: End-of-Turn effects fire +1 time (no stack — best Chronos)
golden_text: Your End of Turn effects trigger 2 more times.
golden_effect: End-of-Turn fires 3x; does NOT stack with other Chronos

name: Blaster
text: Deathrattle: deal 3 damage to ALL minions (yours too).
golden_text: Deathrattle: deal 6 damage to ALL minions (yours too).

name: Jenkins & Fi
text: Deathrattle: destroy the minion that killed this.
golden_text: Deathrattle: destroy the minion that killed this.

name: Alleycat

golden_text: Battlecry: summon two 1/1 Strays next to it.

name: Mama Pup
text: Deathrattle: summon two 1/1 Pups.
golden_text: Deathrattle: summon four 1/1 Pups.

name: Kennelmaster
text: Each Beast you summon gains +1/+1. Avenge (3): Improve this.
golden_text: Each Beast you summon gains +2/+2. Avenge (3): Improve this.

name: Gnasher, the Overrun
text: When it kills a minion, it attacks again and gains +5/+5 (Engraved — kept after combat).
golden_text: When it kills a minion, it attacks again and gains +5/+5.

name: Grim

effect: deathrattleBuffTribeByTally beast +1 per DR (run-wide tally; snapshot at death; rest-of-combat aura)
golden_text: Deathrattle: give your Beasts +2/+2 per Deathrattle triggered this game.

name: Wildwood Shaper
text: Choose One: give your Beasts +1/+1; or summon two 1/1 Strays.
golden_text: Choose One: give your Beasts +2/+2; or summon four 1/1 Strays.
golden_effect: both doubled (Beasts +2/+2; or 4 Strays) via explicit golden_text

name: Spirit Pup

golden_text: Cast 10 spells with this on board to transform into Spirit Worgen.

effect: summonBuffSelfTribe beast+dragon (Spirit Pup transform target; DUAL; not rollable)
golden_effect: inherits the Pup's stats at transform

name: Ember Whelp

name: Cling Drone
text: Each time a Cling Drone is magnetized, your Cling Drones get +1/+1.

name: Selfless Sentinel
